notes: Does not launch; requires 256 color display. Not sure how to work around or force Proton to run in 256 colors.
title: Timelapse

notes: Playing via Steam Play results in an error message saying it requires 256 colors. I tried the steps here: https://wiki.winehq.org/256_Color_Mode and ran it through the latest staging branch of Wine but still didn't work. From the debug logs in the terminal, it seems it uses a weird fullscreen method that currently isn't supported by Wine & by extension, Proton. So as of yet, it's completely unplayable.
title: Timelapse
